review_title: Great way to earn extra based on your skill set
description: I am having a experience with InCruiter as I can selected a much work as I want based on my availability, preference and cost. The Process is simple and their software is also easy to use.
author: Gaurav V.
pros: Working as a technical interviewer "InCruiter is a good way to earn money by taking interviews based on your skills" What do you like best about InCruiter? InCruiter is a good way to earn money by taking interviews based on your skills. It is easy to use, provides opportunities apart from Regular Work. You can work part time or full time based on the availability. Choose your own slots, pick what you feel is worth of spending time. There is no forced process, you can work as you want.
cons: Only issue here is you may not get enough work to convert this from part time to full time. The overall opportunities are less.

review_title: Incruiter - User-Friendly Platform That Simplifies the Entire Interview Process
description: My overall experience with InCruiter has been positive. The platform genuinely simplifies the interview process, from scheduling to final feedback, and most features work smoothly without much manual effort. Communication from the coordinators and support team has always been professional and timely, which makes the workflow easier for both interviewers and candidates.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The platform makes scheduling and coordinating interviews surprisingly quickless back-and-forth with candidates. Video interview quality is stable and overall interview process end-end is good Interviuew confirmation and alert given 1 hrs before to interviewer & candidate Their customer support team responds within the SLA The dashboard layout feels clean and intuitive, so easy to navigate & self learn The payment for the interviewers are provided on time without any delay All coordinators & HR are good professional when they communicate Interview duration for screening candidates are 40-60 mins depending on candidate capabilities
cons: NO SHOW payment credit/debit is not provided for candidate/interviewer no show (usually 25% of fee needs to be provided for candidate no show and same 25% of fee deduction should happen if interviewer should not turn up) - so that it will look even more professional Automated slot selection of available interviews are not provided directly on portals
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable platform with great coordination and very low no-shows
description: My overall experience with InCruiter has been very smooth and efficient. The communication, coordination, and scheduling have all been handled professionally, making interviews easy to conduct. With just a few improvements to the coding editor, the platform can become even more powerful. Overall, a very reliable tool for interviewers.
author: Anuj A.
pros: I really liked the smooth and clear communication with the coordinators during the entire interview scheduling process. Everything was well-organized, and it made it very easy for me as an interviewer. Another major positive was the extremely low no-show rate — out of around 120 interviews, only about 5–6 candidates didn’t show up, which is impressive.
cons: The overall experience has been great, but the code editor can be improved. Adding better support for TypeScript and enhancing the editor’s features would make the technical interview process even more seamless.

description: My overall experience with InCruiter has been good. The platform is easy to use and helps manage candidates efficiently. I liked the clear and structured feedback system, which makes decision-making easier and keeps communication clear within the hiring team.
author: Santosh M.
pros: I found InCruiter clear feedback and transparent system very helpful, as it makes decision-making easier.
cons: Certain reporting and analytics options could be more detailed or customizable to provide deeper insights.

review_title: Online interviews and assessments made easy
description: My Overall experience is very good. It is very easy to work with InCruiter. I work part time here and earn some extra in my free time. The scheduling, cancellation of interviews is easy and the team is also available on the call for help.
author: Nidhi J.
pros: It is important tool to ensures that online interviews and assessments are conducted fairly, securely, and authentically. InCruiter is helpful and widely used for remote hiring. I like how simple it is to take technical interview on this platform and they only take care of interview management. Feedback system is good and is easy to understand. Technical tools integration is also a very good feature here.
cons: Sometimes are interview is about such skills which can be judged by practical examples only but it is difficult to have detailed practical problem and solution at the single platform. This should be improved somehow.

description: The resource is well-designed, intuitive, and highly practical. It is easy to understand and apply, enabling users to derive value quickly without additional clarification. The structure, clarity, and relevance make it effective for day-to-day use, and it meaningfully supports efficiency and consistency in execution.
author: Shruti P.
pros: Value for Money, Simple Recruitment process, Easy to use, People are very friendly, it's very good as an app.
cons: Feedbacks can be more specific as sometimes it is very difficult to gauge the specific feedback and understand the final result.

description: Positive reviews for its recruitment platform from users and clients, highlighting ease of use, efficient scheduling, and the quality of its interview panel. However, employee reviews are mixed, with praise for learning opportunities but significant criticism regarding work-life balance and management.
author: Rajesh M.
pros: Supportive team environment, good learning and career growth opportunities, and a chance to gain exposure to various technologies.
cons: the poor work-life balance, primarily due to a mandatory six-day work schedule. There are also reports of a moderate work culture, not good management, lack of clear HR policies, and general disorganization

description: Using InCruiter made the interview process more structured and predictable. Once I got familiar with the platform, it significantly reduced follow-ups and operational overhead. It’s especially useful for teams that conduct frequent or high-volume interviews. While there’s room for improvement in usability and flexibility, it delivers well on its core promise of simplifying interview management.
author: Krishna R.
pros: What stood out to me the most was how much manual effort InCruiter removed from interview coordination. Scheduling interviews, aligning interviewer availability, and tracking feedback became far more organized compared to doing everything over emails and spreadsheets. The interviewers provided through the platform were professional and well-prepared, which added credibility to the hiring process. It especially helped during bulk hiring when managing multiple candidates at once would otherwise become chaotic.
cons: The platform isn’t completely plug-and-play. It took some time to understand the workflow and where certain actions are located. A few features feel slightly rigid, and there’s limited room for customization based on specific hiring processes. At times, small coordination delays happened, particularly when interviews were scheduled at short notice.

description: 4/5, it is very nice, and improvement is needed but overall they are doing good and solving biggest problem of searching interviewer for every role
author: NEHA S.
pros: they are active and available over weekend, They helped in closing most important position and we were very happy
cons: sometimes there is miss-communication, sometimes they forget to send invites, and sometimes they dont give updates on time

review_title: Good Support, Quality Thought, Good Relationship, Good Communication, Good Knowledge
description: Very satisfactory, Interview Support, Customer Support, Easy to Use, Recruitment Process, Interview Process, Search Functionality

cons: Quality of the interview

description: I have enjoyed my time with recruiter and it was very smooth conducting interviews. Payment also happens in time.

cons: Very professional in approaching the interviewers and co-ordination between the candidate and interviewers.

description: Overall really this is very nice and productive platform not for only candidates but also for companies for reliable transperant process of hiring
author: Vikashkumar Jayantibhai P.
pros: As per my experience with InCruiter, I must say the way taking interview and constant presence is most important, also there is a facility for code writing which covers technical part smoothly with candidate
cons: The one thing which can be improved by InCruiter is assign interviewer, as sometimes I face the issue like last time I came to know that I have one interview just in 30 mins, so that should be improved for better smoothly process

description: Overall the experience so far is best and no regret of joining this platform. Even the co-ordinators are supportive.

pros: InCruiter has a good management software for interviewers. Hence, the application finds more user friendly while updating the feedback
cons: We have the capacity for conducting more interviews and they can increase my load which I see is not coming.

description: The Interview-as-a-Service model saves significant recruiter time while ensuring candidates are evaluated by domain experts. The platform’s ease of use and intuitive interface make scheduling and conducting interviews straightforward.
author: Manpreet S.
pros: InCruiter makes recruitment faster and smarter with expert interviewers, AI-driven tools, and an easy-to-use platform that saves time, reduces costs, and ensures fair candidate evaluations.
cons: Customization options for branding and reporting could be expanded further to match diverse organizational needs.

description: My overall experience with InCruiter has been positive due to its user-friendly interface and effective AI-powered matching algorithms. However, there could be limitations in terms of its user base and network compared to more established platforms.
author: Sagar B.
pros: One of the standout features of InCruiter is its intuitive interface, which makes the recruitment process efficient and streamlined. Additionally, its AI-powered matching algorithms significantly enhance candidate sourcing and selection.
cons: One drawback of InCruiter is that it may not have as large of a user base or network compared to more established platforms, potentially limiting the pool of available candidates or job opportunities.

pros: Cost Efficiency: Incruiter's usage of man-made data driven video interviews achieves a striking 80% lessening in costs, going with it a financially attracting decision for affiliations. 2. Time Optimization:The stage's improvement adds to a fourfold accelerate the utilizing framework, allowing relationship to productively streamline their determination attempts.
cons: Uncertainty in Attestation Process:Concerns could arise about the getting through quality and consistency of the choice cycle while energetically responsible to mechanized thinking, conceivably activating weaknesses in promising new youth around confirmation.

author: Vashanavi ..
pros: The intuitive interface, comprehensive features, and AI-powered matching algorithm were standout features that impressed users the most about InCruiter . Videos interviews helped me a lot.
cons: While InCruiter has many strengths, some users have noted minor drawbacks such as occasional glitches in the interface and a learning curve for new users. However, these issues are outweighed by the platform's overall effectiveness and usability.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I absolutely loved using Incruiter! The user-friendly interface made it super easy to navigate and find relevant job opportunities. The extensive job listings provided a wide range of options to choose from. Additionally, the networking features helped me connect with professionals in my field. Overall, Incruiter has been a game-changer in my job search. Highly recommended!
cons: While using InCruiter, I found that the search filters could be more specific, which sometimes made it a bit challenging to narrow down the job listings. Additionally, it would be great if there were more options for customizing notifications based on specific preferences. Overall, these are minor points, and I still found InCruiter to be a valuable platform for job searching. Keep up the good work!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Yusuf K.
pros: AI-based interview platforms, online interviewing platforms, and video recruitment platforms are all tools designed to streamline and enhance the hiring process. These platforms often utilize technologies such as natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning to analyze candidate responses, assess skills, and facilitate remote interviews. They offer benefits like increased efficiency, reduced bias, and broader reach for both employers and candidates. Popular examples include HireVue, Spark Hire, and VidCruiter.

review_title: Positive working condition and time saving
description: As my experience they provide at least over 3000 interviews and enhance the hiring process. Their team work is great .one of the best video interviews I come across . I highly recommend it .
author: Parthana B.
pros: It's saves my time and I can interact with my people of my niche on my own.
cons: I have no bad impression about incruiter yet .

review_title: Useful for Startup and Small Businesses
description: InCruiter's dedication to streamlining recruitment is evident, and their platform is a must-have for businesses, start-ups, and enterprises alike. Experience the efficiency and innovation of InCruiter today!
author: Jainam Z.
pros: InCruiter has truly revolutionized our hiring process. As a busy and non HR person I am, I've found their AI Powered Video Interview Solution is a game-changer. The seamless integration of artificial intelligence with a vast network of expert interviewee has expedited our hiring process by fourfold.
cons: This bit costly not much but as startup owner we face little issue initally but when we start getting result then we find it much more worth than the price we paid
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very comfortable in using and easy to finish my tasks of interviews
author: Aakanksha A.
pros: After using multiple softwares, I finally ended up with incruiter which I feel is the best AI interview software. It's interview management system contains freelance interviewer, AI interview, video recruitment platform, interview co-pilot,online interviewnling platform. It has made my work so easy for hiring multiple candidates for multiples post. I don't have to end up calling many people at my workplace and make a mess. With incruiter, I simply sit and manage everything on their system. It has saved lot of money, time and efforts. I highly recommend every HR to use incruiter over any other company who provides interview service.
cons: Incruiter can also add up job seekers and job listings so that it is easier for the companies to find candidates as well
